zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Hill於大約1608年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特威爾斯時，她的父親Johis Bodye24歲，母親Joan Cross11歲。她於1631年與Peter FitzRobert Hill在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾斯瓦福哈姆 普萊爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1635年在美國緬因州約克薩可享年28歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Hill于大约1608年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特威爾斯时，她的父亲Johis Bodye24岁，母亲Joan Cross11岁。她于1631年与Peter FitzRobert Hill在英国英格兰坎布利其爾斯瓦福哈姆 普萊爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1635年在美国缅因州約克薩可享年28岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a hill, from Middle English hill, hell, hull ‘hill’ (Old English hyll). Compare Hiller . This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: possibly in some cases from the personal name Hille, a pet form of some name such as Hilger or Hillary .
German: from a short form of Hildebrand or any of a variety of other names, male and female, containing ancient Germanic hild ‘battle’ as the first element.

variants.name: Hillock
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) small hill’, from Middle English hillok, a diminutive of hille (Old English hyll ‘hill’). See Hill .

variants.name: Hills
meanings: English: variant of Hill with genitival -s if a relationship name, attested in Matilda Hilles, 1327 (Somerset), where the genitival form may signify widowhood; or with plural -s if habitational, attested in Johanne de Hyles, 1379 (Bickerstaffe, Lancashire), and Ricardo del Hyles, 1379 (Great Eccleston, Lancashire); or, with post-medieval excrescent -s, probably the most common form.

variants.name: Hiller
meanings: German: metronymic from Hille, a pet form of the female personal name Hildegund (see Hilke ).
German: from a masculine personal beginning with the ancient Germanic element hild ‘strife, battle’.

variants.name: Hil
meanings: Dutch (Van den Hil): topographic name from hil, hul ‘hill’, particularly in the sense of a flight hill above sea level in the southwestern Netherlands.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
meanings: Hebrew: Bitter; Marion is the French form.

variants.name: Marion
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

variants.name: Marcia
meanings: Often used as a feminine equivalent of Mark , but in fact a feminine form of Marcius, itself a derivative of Marcus . One St Marcia is commemorated in a group with Felix, Luciolus, Fortunatus, and others; another with Zenais, Cyria, and Valeria; and a third with Ariston, Crescentian, Eutychian, Urban, Vitalis, Justus, Felicissimus, Felix, and Symphorosa. None is individually very famous.

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries: 1716: York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1776: York, Massachusetts, United States 1820: York, Maine, United States
1630: Charter granted to establish a town at Saco. 1631: Settled. 1775: Incorporated as the Town of Pepperellborough. 1805:  Renamed Saco. 1867: Incorporated as a City.

Historical Boundaries: 1635: Massachusetts Bay Colony, British colonial America 1652: Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1664: Maine, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1668: York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1680: Massachusetts Claim, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1691: York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1776: York, Massachusetts, United States 1820: York, Maine, United States

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Hill was born about 1608, in Wells, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Johis Bodye, was 24 and her mother, Joan Cross, was 11. She married Peter FitzRobert Hill in 1631, in Swaffham Prior, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1635, in Saco, York, Maine, United States, at the age of 28.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Hill est née environ 1608, à Wells, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Johis Bodye, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Joan Cross, avait 11 ans. Elle a épousé Peter FitzRobert Hill en 1631, à Swaffham Prior, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1635, à Saco, York, Maine, États-Unis, à l’âge de 28 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Hillが約1608年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトウエルズで生まれた時，父Johis Bodyeは24歳，母Joan Crossは11歳であった。1631年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアスワフハム プリオルでPeter FitzRobert Hillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1635年にアメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークサコで28歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Hill(이)가 대략 1608년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 웰스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Johis Bodye(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Cross(은)는 11세였다. 그녀는 1631년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 스와프함 프리어에서 Peter FitzRobert Hill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1635년 미국 메인 주 요르크 사코에서 28세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Peter FitzRobert Hill em 1631, em Swaffham Prior, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Hill родилась около 1608 г. в местности веллс, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Johis Bodye было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Cross, 11. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Peter FitzRobert Hill в 1631 г. в местности сваффхам приор, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1635 г. в местности сако, ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 28 лет.
